SLOT ingatellentConfigProperties
    INSERT {
	property ~&7083178290016&~ currentDocId: ""
        property ~&7083178290016&~ previousDocId: ""
    }
END SLOT

AFFECT [[17298303916558156758]]
    TRAVERSE [[254504370080162629]]
        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
            ~&8545339034058226003&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: ingSwipeLeftForLastDocument
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "ingLastDocument";
                ~&7712927726759444&~: 2 * ~&254549375155946341&~.~&496707965879903317&~
                ~&254526613107157226&~: ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(1, 0)
                ~&6503646466&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0, 0, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&214646099849&~ , ~&254549375155946341&~.~&7082729686082&~ )
                ~&233727659172727&~: 4
                ~&233726547792244&~: !~&254549375155946341&~.~&16735792760298061570&~
                ~&495358363329399331&~: ~&6504391364&~.ingatellentOpenLastDocument()
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[11806562588218124596]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]
        LOCATE BEFORE ALL
        INSERT { signal ingatellentOpenLastDocument }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[1224665461898798997]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]] > [[5728643844066569666]]
        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT { onIngatellentOpenLastDocument: openLastDocument() }
    END TRAVERSE
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]
        LOCATE AFTER ALL INSERT {
            function openLastDocument() {
                ~&214622607920&~ recentDocumentId = ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.previousDocId
                ~&5972376&~ (!recentDocumentId || recentDocumentId === "") ~&7083121450889&~

                ~&2918312801265623842&~.~&15633749529890334145&~(~&7712934851008712&~, ~&477346483278306569&~);

                ~&254540341572282132&~.~&7712989590835962&~.~&6504147419&~(recentDocumentId);
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]
        REBUILD [[15540965305686433881]]
            LOCATE BEFORE { ~&7712198086779994&~.~&7713258341914895&~ = ~&7712934851008712&~.~&5972374&~; }
            REMOVE LOCATED
            INSERT {
                ~&5972376&~ (~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.currentDocId != ~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~.~&5972374&~){
                    ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.previousDocId = ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.currentDocId
                    ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.currentDocId = ~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~.~&5972374&~
                    ~&7712198086779994&~.~&7713258341914895&~ = ~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~.~&5972374&~;
                }
            }
        END REBUILD
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
